article_title: United Therapeutics Wins FDA Clearance for EXPRESS, the First Pig-Heart Xenotransplant Trial Designed to Support a BLA
summary: Submission approvable with 1 minor warning(s) — file a corrections record on merge

editor_notes.overall_assessment: Exemplary submission. Every specific verified verbatim against the official UTHR investor-relations press release (source-0): EXPRESS trial name, UHeart, May 15 2026 date, single-center start, two-participant initial cohort, 12-week follow-up gate, independent DMC, phase 1/2/3 'phaseless' design, ≥50 years age criterion, ACC/AHA stage D + NYHA Class IV, LVEF + global longitudinal strain + RV free-wall strain endpoints, 24-week QoL, 6-minute walk distance, 10 gene edits (6 human added + 4 porcine knocked out), and both direct quotes (DeSmet 'Moving a porcine-derived heart...' and Byrd 'Patients with end stage heart disease...') character-for-character verbatim. The UKidney February 2025 cross-reference is correctly sourced to source-3 (the actual Feb 3 2025 UTHR release). Internal cross-reference to 2026-03/23-organ-transplant-medicine... verified to exist.

source-0.status: Primary UTHR IR release. All article specifics verified verbatim. Allowlist warning is operational only — ir.unither.com is the company's official investor-relations subdomain.

source-1.status: Financial wire mirror of the UTHR press release. Used for the Byrd quote citation; full quote text verified verbatim. Allowlist warning operational only.

source-2.status: STAT historical (Feb 3 2025) coverage of the UKidney IND clearance. Verifies the 'compassionate-use waivers' framing the article uses and the 'first xenotransplantation clinical trial' characterization.

source-3.status: Original UTHR UKidney IND release (Feb 3 2025 per URL path). Verifies the 'phaseless' design language and supports the article's framing of the prior trial.

editor_notes.content_quality: Well structured (Overview / What We Know / What We Don't Know / Context). Neutral, professional tone. Appropriate length for Briefing (~630 words). The 'What We Don't Know' section honestly enumerates the open questions (single-center identity, immunosuppression regimen, surgery timeline, registrational-stage transition).
editor_notes.originality: First Machine Herald coverage of EXPRESS specifically; correctly cross-references the March 23 xenotransplantation overview as continuity.
recommendations: Add ir.unither.com and stocktitan.net to config/source_allowlist.txt as a follow-up.

content_preview.title: United Therapeutics Wins FDA Clearance for EXPRESS, the First Pig-Heart Xenotransplant Trial Designed to Support a BLA
content_preview.summary: The FDA cleared an IND for UHeart, a 10-gene-edited pig heart, opening a single-center phase 1/2/3 trial that will enroll up to two patients with end-stage heart failure before any expansion.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

United Therapeutics Corporation said on May 15, 2026 that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration has cleared its Investigational New Drug application to begin EXPRESS, a clinical study of an investigational pig heart known as UHeart, [according to the company's investor-relations release](https://ir.unither.com/press-releases/2026/05-15-2026-230017490). The clearance opens the first formal human trial of a pig-derived heart in the United States and the first xenoheart study explicitl...

recommendations: Before merging, the human reviewer should write a corrections file at src/content/corrections/<YYYY-MM>/<article-slug>.json documenting the warning(s).
Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt
